notes:
I'm able to install, run the game and create a character without any trouble using any proton 9, experimental or GE.

However I was never able to play for more than a few seconds. When launching the tutorial I encounter an EAC error sending me back to the main menu.
I tried Proton 9, Experimental, GE-Proton-9-14.

I tried reinstalling, validating game files, forcing the execution of EAC installer following the instructions for Windows.

Nothing works. I am out of ideas and don't understand what could be so specific to my setup since many people seems to be able to play. Perhaps Wayland, multimonitor setup, custom local plays a role.

There was also a sound issue (audio was switching output every few seconds) wich I fixed by disabling HDMI output.
